info.description:
Rekall is a call intelligence platform. Record, transcribe, and analyse voice and video calls.
This API powers the Rekall web application and is available for direct integration.

## Authentication
Protected endpoints require a JWT access token obtained from `POST /api/v1/auth/login`.
Pass the token in the `Authorization` header as `Bearer <token>`.
The refresh token is transported exclusively via an `HttpOnly` cookie set by the server.

## Response Envelope
All responses are wrapped in a standard envelope:
- Success: `{ "success": true, "data": <T>, "meta": <pagination|null> }`
- Error:   `{ "success": false, "error": { "code": "ERROR_CODE", "message": "Human readable message", "details": <null|object> } }`

## Error Codes
Every error response includes a machine-readable `code` field. Common codes:
`INVALID_CREDENTIALS`, `EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED`, `EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED`,
`INVALID_OR_EXPIRED_TOKEN`, `INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN`, `MISSING_TOKEN`, `INVALID_TOKEN`,
`CALL_NOT_FOUND`, `USER_NOT_FOUND`, `SLUG_ALREADY_TAKEN`, `ALREADY_A_MEMBER`,
`CANNOT_REMOVE_OWNER`, `INVITATION_EMAIL_MISMATCH`, `DEPARTMENT_NOT_FOUND`, `FORBIDDEN`
info.title: Rekall API

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password. On success returns a short-lived JWT **access_token** (15 min) and sets an `HttpOnly Secure SameSite=Strict` **refresh_token** cookie (7 days).
Revokes the refresh token stored in the `HttpOnly` cookie and clears the cookie. Access tokens are stateless and expire naturally — no server-side invalidation is needed.

204.description: Signed out — refresh token revoked and cookie cleared

get.description: Returns the full profile of the authenticated user. Requires a valid JWT access token in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header.

post.description: Sends a password reset link to the given email address. **Always returns 200 regardless of whether the email is registered** to prevent user enumeration. The reset link is valid for 1 hour.

Sets a new password using a valid, unexpired password reset token. On success all active refresh tokens for the user are revoked, forcing re-login on all devices. Password must be 8+ characters with at least one letter and one digit.

400.description: Token invalid, expired, or already used (INVALID_OR_EXPIRED_TOKEN)

422.description: Validation error — password complexity requirements not met

post.description: Exchanges the `refresh_token` cookie for a new JWT access token. The refresh token is **rotated** — the old one is revoked and a new cookie is issued atomically.

401.description: Refresh token invalid, expired, or revoked (INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN)

post.description: Creates a new user account with email and password. The user receives a verification email and **cannot sign in until their email is confirmed**.

201.description: Account created — check email for a verification link

422.description: Validation error — see details for field-level errors

get.description: Marks the user's email as verified using the single-use token delivered in the verification email. The token is valid for 24 hours.

parameters.description: Raw verification token from the email link
parameters.name: token

400.description: Token missing, invalid, expired, or already used (INVALID_OR_EXPIRED_TOKEN)

post.description: Generates a new verification token, invalidates any prior pending token, and resends the verification email to the given address.

parameters.description: Email address to resend verification to
parameters.name: body

200.description: Verification email sent (if the address is registered and unverified)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of call records sorted by creation date descending. Optionally filter by status or user ID.

post.description: Creates a new call record in `pending` status. The call can be updated later with a recording URL, transcript, and timing once processing completes.

get.description: Returns a single call record by its UUID.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a call record. The record is retained in the database but excluded from all future list and get queries.

patch.description: Partially updates a call record. All fields are optional — only the fields present in the request body are modified.

get.description: Returns a single department by its UUID. Restricted to members of the parent organization.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a department and removes all its memberships. Restricted to `owner` or `admin` members of the parent organization.

patch.description: Updates a department's name and/or description. Restricted to `owner` or `admin` members of the parent organization.

get.description: Returns all members of the specified department with their roles.

post.description: Adds an existing organization member to the department with the specified role. The target user must already be a member of the parent organization.
post.summary: Add a member to a department

409.description: User is already a department member (ALREADY_A_MEMBER)

delete.description: Removes a user from the department. The user remains a member of the parent organization. Restricted to `owner` or `admin`.
delete.summary: Remove a member from a department

patch.description: Changes a department member's role (`head` or `member`). Restricted to `owner` or `admin` members of the parent organization.

post.description: Accepts a pending invitation and adds the authenticated user to the organization with the role specified in the invitation. The invitation token is single-use and valid for 7 days.

400.description: Token invalid, expired, or already accepted (INVALID_OR_EXPIRED_INVITATION)

403.description: Authenticated user email does not match invitation email (INVITATION_EMAIL_MISMATCH)

post.description: Creates a new meeting room. Open meetings allow any authenticated user to join directly; private meetings restrict access to org/department members.

400.description: Invalid request body or host meeting limit reached

get.description: Returns all meetings the authenticated user hosted or participated in, enriched with computed duration and up to 3 participant previews. Supports filtering by status and sorting by multiple criteria.
Returns a single meeting by its short code (e.g. abc-defg-hij). Does not require authentication.

delete.description: Ends an active meeting. Only the host may call this. Marks all participants as left and sets ended_at.

get.description: Returns the chat history for a meeting, ordered by sent_at ascending. Supports cursor-based pagination via the `before` query parameter (messages strictly older than the cursor are returned). Accessible to the host and to anyone who has ever been an admitted participant.
get.summary: List chat messages for a meeting

parameters.description: RFC3339 cursor — returns messages strictly older
parameters.name: before

get.description: Upgrades the connection to WebSocket and places the caller into the meeting hub. The JWT access token must be passed as the `token` query parameter because WebSocket clients cannot send custom headers during the handshake. Callers who are scope members join directly; others enter the waiting room (knock flow).

403.description: Access denied (meeting ended or at capacity)

get.description: Returns all organizations the authenticated user is a member of (any role). There is no pagination — the list is bounded by the user's membership count.

post.description: Creates a new organization workspace. The authenticated user automatically becomes the `owner` member. The slug is derived from the name if not provided.

get.description: Returns a single organization by ID. Non-members receive **404** (not 403) to avoid leaking existence.

404.description: Organization not found or access denied

delete.description: Soft-deletes the organization and all its memberships. Restricted to the `owner`.

404.description: Organization not found or access denied

patch.description: Updates the organization name. Restricted to members with `owner` or `admin` role.

403.description: Insufficient role — owner or admin required (FORBIDDEN)

404.description: Organization not found or access denied

get.description: Returns all departments belonging to the specified organization. Restricted to organization members.

404.description: Organization not found or access denied

post.description: Creates a new department within the specified organization. Restricted to `owner` or `admin` members.

404.description: Organization not found or access denied

post.description: Sends an email invitation to the given address. If a pending invitation for that email already exists it is refreshed (expiry reset, email re-sent) rather than creating a duplicate. Restricted to `owner` or `admin`.
post.summary: Invite a user to an organization

404.description: Organization not found or access denied

get.description: Returns all active members of the organization with their roles. Restricted to current members.

404.description: Organization not found or access denied

delete.description: Removes a user from the organization. The `owner` cannot be removed via this endpoint — ownership must be transferred first. Restricted to `owner` or `admin`.

patch.description: Changes a member's role within the organization. Restricted to `owner` or `admin`. An `admin` cannot promote another user to `owner` or modify another `admin`.

400.description: Cannot remove or demote the owner (CANNOT_REMOVE_OWNER)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all platform users. **Requires `admin` role.** Regular members receive 403.

post.description: Creates a new platform user directly (admin operation — bypasses the self-registration flow). **Requires `admin` role.**

get.description: Returns a single user profile by UUID. **Requires `admin` role.**
Returns 200 as long as the server process is running. Used by load balancers and orchestrators to verify the process is alive.
Returns 200 when the database connection is healthy. Returns 503 if the database is unreachable. Used by orchestrators to gate traffic until the service is fully initialised.

200.description: Server is ready and database is reachable

message.example: call with the given ID was not found

transcript.example: Alice: Hello, this is Alice from Rekall...

BearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT access token as: **Bearer <token>**
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
